event: Miracle of the Locusts from the Legend of Saint Barbara
symbols: golden halo around Barbara — sanctity and divine favor
locusts covering the ground — the miraculous plague sent to confuse pursuers
sheep grazing peacefully — innocence under divine protection
shepherds pointing — witnesses to the miraculous event
gold background — heavenly realm and sacred narrative
description: A medieval panel painting on a gold background showing several figures arranged on a hilly landscape. At upper right, a female figure with a golden halo rides or sits upon an animal. At upper left, bearded men in elaborate hats gesture toward her. Below, two shepherds tend a flock of white sheep on green ground covered with small red-brown creatures resembling locusts. Trees and rocky terrain frame the scene.

_meta.title: Locust miracle from Barbara altar from the Kalanti church in Finland
